name: Grandma's Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the cream of mushroom soup and chicken broth until well combined.
2. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
3. Reduce heat to low and cook for about 10 minutes or until the gravy has thickened to your desired consistency.
4. Season with black pepper to taste.
5. Serve hot over Grandma's Dressing, topped with cranberry sauce.
